title: Mokka Manusha Lyrics Kalakalappu Songs Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Mokka manusha
Singers: Steevevatz & Suchithra Karthik

Movie: Kalakalappu @ Masala Cafe
Music: Vijay Ebenezer
Lyricist: Pa.Vijay

Dear sagalai's and ragalai's
Address-eh illaama advice pannuvor sangam
kattina paatu ithu

Come-on come-on come-on come-on
Gopaalu meiyaalu
appaalu thabbaalu ..ohh..

Mokka manusha..nee oppuku chappa
hey lambaa lambaa..ne makka makka (2)

oh... follow me
Repeat-u..apeatu.. delete-u..repeatu..
reveetu..apeatu ..delete..repeat..

life eh masala ensaai da saala
life eh masala ensaai da saala (2)

Mokka manusha..nee oppuku chappa
hey lambaa lambaa..ne makka makka

Sugar illaa gulaab jamoon kupaiyinile
Figure illaa bus ellam pickup illae
Aaku phoku aatam illaa ragalai illai
hey ajili gujili asku busuku avasthe ille
yo yo yo yo yo
life eh masala ensaai da saala(2)

Vaazhkai na see-saw
thirimbidichu lesa
ipothu namma timeh dhan raasa

Mokka manusha..nee oppuku chappa
hey lambaa lambaa..ne makka makka
hey..mokka manusha..un luck la thappa
hey eppa eppa..ne kaali dappa

lets go
Kaasu iruntha call taxi thola
paisa illana kaaleh taxi thola
naalu roadula nikkuthada life
ode odathaan ennaikume sirappu

Vaazhkai na see-saw
thirimbidichu lesa
ipothu namma timeh dhan raasa

Mokka manusha..nee oppuku chappa
hey lambaa lambaa..ne makka makka
hey..mokka manusha..un luck la thappa
hey eppa eppa..ne kaali dappa

Omlet rotti evening la special tea
ithu kooda illati..so what lets party
one side pondatti, one side vapaatti
balance pannaa avan dhan killaadi

Kozhi kaal soup vachan
aatu kaal soup vachan
missed call soup vaipaana

Naai vaalu valanjirukkum
poona vaalu valanjirukkum
Compound vaalu valanjirukkuma?  ma maa

Mokka manusha..nee oppuku chappa
hey lambaa lambaa..ne makka makka (2)

oh... follow me

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Mokka Manusha?

The song Mokka Manusha conveys a light-hearted and fun vibe, encouraging listeners to embrace joy and laughter.

What is the plot context of the movie Kalakalappu?

Kalakalappu is a comedy film that revolves around the humorous situations faced by its characters, making the song a perfect fit for its lively narrative.

Who are the singers of Mokka Manusha?

The song features the talented voices of Steevevatz and Suchitra, who bring an energetic performance to the track.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Mokka Manusha was composed by Vijay Ebenezer, known for his catchy and engaging tunes.

When was Mokka Manusha released?

The song was released on April 23, 2012, as part of the film's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Mokka Manusha, the lively beats and playful lyrics create an atmosphere of joy and celebration, perfectly aligning with the comedic essence of Kalakalappu. The song captures the carefree spirit of the characters as they navigate humorous situations, making it a highlight of the film. With its upbeat tempo, it evokes feelings of happiness and encourages listeners to dance along. Overall, this track is a delightful addition to any festive occasion.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Mokka Manusha from the movie Kalakalappu is a vibrant celebration of life and energy, brought to life by the dynamic voices of Steevevatz and Suchitra. With catchy beats and playful lyrics, this song is sure to get you moving and grooving. The collaboration between the talented lyricist Pa Vijay and music director Vijay Ebenezer adds a unique flair that makes this track unforgettable.
